# Locations

Specimens in this archive are tied to the places they were collected — and place is
often the strongest identification evidence there is.

Locations here are deliberately generalized: a county, a geological region, a river
system, a formation. Exact collecting spots are kept private to protect landowners and
sensitive sites. Location pages will appear as specimens are published.
